steps.title: Fastest check: compare a table or graph
steps.content: For an equivalent-expression question, enter the original expression and the answer choices in a calculator table or graph. The correct choice must match for several inputs, not just one. The matching choice is B, $6{x}^{4}$.

steps.title: Algebra check
steps.content: Use the work below to confirm the identity for every allowed input. This matters because one random matching input is only a quick screen, not a proof that two expressions are always equivalent.

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: Both terms have the same variable part, $x^4$, so combine only the coefficients.

steps.title: Subtract the coefficients
steps.content: $13x^4-7x^4=(13-7)x^4=6x^4$. The exponent stays $4$ because the terms are being added or subtracted, not multiplied.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The equivalent expression is $6x^4$, which matches B.
